item.description:
## What’s fixed
- The menu bar now keeps showing **Update available** after you choose **Later** in the update dialog. - Manual and automatic update checks now share the same update state, so the available-version badge remains accurate until the update is installed or is no longer newer.
This release keeps the existing adaptive blue version badge styling in both Light and Dark Mode.

# CueNow 1.4.1
## Fixes
- Fixed numbered lists not scrolling to reveal the new current item when Return is pressed at the bottom of the visible note area. - Nested numbered lists now also keep the newly inserted sub-list item fully visible before you begin typing.

# CueNow 1.4.0
## What’s new
- Added nested numbered lists. Continue a list with Return, use Tab to move into deeper `a.` and `i.` levels, and move back out one level at a time while keeping notes compatible with plain text. - Glass notes now adapt fully to the system appearance. Light Mode uses readable dark text and controls over clear Liquid Glass, while Dark Mode keeps the light foreground with a lighter 10% dark tint. - Refreshed Settings with clearer grouped sections and a coordinated Light and Dark Mode palette across Configuration, Note History, App Updates, and Support.
## Improvements and fixes
- AI-generated titles now finish updating even after the note window—or the last open CueNow window—has been closed. - Changing the request type in Support no longer clears the title, description, or attachments already entered. - Support attachments now enforce the displayed limit of five files at up to 5 MB each, while preserving valid files when an invalid selection is rejected. - Editing a Support draft after a failed submission now clears the stale error and lets you correct and resend it immediately. - Automatically detected updates now open the focused update-details dialog instead of moving the Settings window to another tab.
